description_long: This is a small, freestanding wooden cabinet with a distressed blue and brown painted finish, giving it a rustic, vintage appearance. The front features two vertically-oriented doors with decorative cutouts and metal bars, reminiscent of a birdcage or display cabinet, and a small step or ledge at the base. The top of the cabinet is bordered by a scalloped wooden trim, adding to its ornamental style. The sides and back are solid panels, with the same weathered blue and brown coloration, and no visible openings or hardware. The cabinet appears to be constructed primarily from wood, with metal bars on the doors and simple hinges. Its compact size and decorative design suggest it could be used for storage or display in an urban outdoor or indoor setting, such as a sidewalk, park, or entryway.
description: A small, rustic wooden cabinet with distressed blue and brown paint, featuring barred double doors and decorative trim. The cabinet has a vintage look and is suitable for storage or display.
description_view_0: Front view showing two barred doors with decorative cutouts, a small base ledge, and scalloped trim on top.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a solid blue-brown panel with no openings or hardware visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat, solid back panel with the same distressed blue and brown finish.
description_view_3: Right side view, similar to the left, with a solid panel and no visible features except the edge of the doors.
